prompt: {"cn_long": ["画面采用固定机位拍摄。一位女性正对着镜头，面带微笑。她先是静立，随后抬起左手轻轻整理领口附近的部位。她的右手提着一块带有深色花纹的布料。整个视频过程中，摄像头保持不动，焦点始终对准人物。", "这是一位留着深棕色长发的女性，妆容精致，戴着长款绿色珠子耳坠。她身穿一件鲜艳的绿色针织衫，上面布满了复杂的黄色、红色和深绿色的菱形及几何图案，下身搭配黑色长裤。背景为室内环境，左侧是简约的灰色墙面，右侧悬挂着橘色的褶皱窗帘，旁边隐约可见一盆绿植。画面光线均匀，色彩明亮，构图居中。"], "cn_short": ["女子面向镜头微笑并整理领口，右手提着一块花色布料。", "室内场景，女子留长发，穿着一件带有菱形图案的绿色毛衣和黑色裤子。"], "en_long": ["The video is captured from a static camera angle. A woman stands facing the camera with a smile. She remains still at first, then raises her left hand to gently adjust the area near her collar. In her right hand, she holds a piece of fabric with dark patterns. The camera remains fixed throughout the video, keeping the focus on the subject.", "The woman has long dark brown hair, refined makeup, and wears long green beaded earrings. She is dressed in a vibrant green knit sweater adorned with intricate diamond and geometric patterns in yellow, red, and dark green, paired with black trousers. The setting is an indoor environment with a plain grey wall on the left and orange pleated curtains on the right, with a small potted plant partially visible. The lighting is even, the colors are bright, and the composition is centered."], "en_short": ["A woman smiles at the camera, adjusts her collar area, and holds a patterned cloth.", "Indoor setting; a woman with long hair wearing a green sweater with diamond patterns and black pants."]}

{"cn_long": ["一名长发女子在平坦的柏油路上迎着镜头走来。她先是侧身向后张望，随后转回正面继续前行，双手起初在身体两侧摆动，接着抬起并扶向头部，全程面带微笑，眼神始终与镜头保持互动。", "背景为一段干净的灰色柏油马路，地面上可见黄色的交通标线。光影明亮自然，呈现出写实的户外街拍风格，构图始终以人物为中心。女子肩上挎着一个黑色的大容量手提皮包。"], "cn_short": ["女子在马路上边走边向镜头微笑，并抬起双手扶向头部。", "写实街拍风格，背景为柏油马路，女子携带一个黑色皮质挎包。"], "en_long": ["A woman with long hair walks toward the camera on a flat asphalt road. She briefly turns her head to look back before facing forward and continuing her stride. Her hands move from her sides to her head as she smiles and maintains eye contact with the camera throughout the walk.", "The background consists of a clean gray asphalt road with yellow traffic markings. The lighting is bright and natural, creating a realistic outdoor street photography style with a centered composition. The woman carries a large black leather-like shoulder bag."], "en_short": ["A woman walks toward the camera, smiling and raising her hands to her head.", "Realistic street style with an asphalt background and a black shoulder bag."]}

{"cn_long": ["一名年轻女子面对镜头，露出微笑并将双手叉在腰间，随着律动轻微晃动身体。随后，她迅速向左侧转身，转过一圈后重新面向镜头。整个视频过程中，摄像机保持固定机位，没有任何推拉或摇摄动作。", "视频场景设定在一个充满生活气息的室内空间。背景上方悬挂着带有卡通小熊和树木图案的白色半透明窗帘。女子的身后是一个开放式的置物架，上面堆放着包袋、毛绒玩偶和各种生活杂物。室内光线明亮且分布均匀，整体呈现出写实且温馨的居家风格，构图以人物为中心。"], "cn_short": ["女子面对镜头双手叉腰随律动摇摆，并完成了一次快速转身，摄像机位固定。", "室内背景设有杂物架和卡通图案窗帘，光线明亮，写实居家风格。"], "en_long": ["A young woman faces the camera with a smile, placing her hands on her hips and swaying slightly to a rhythm. She then performs a quick turn to her left, completing a full rotation before facing the camera again. Throughout the video, the camera remains in a fixed position without any zooming or panning movements.", "The video is set in an indoor environment filled with personal belongings. In the upper background, a white semi-transparent curtain featuring cartoon bear and tree patterns is visible. Behind the woman, there are open shelves cluttered with bags, plush toys, and various household items. The lighting is bright and evenly distributed, creating a realistic and cozy domestic atmosphere with a centered composition."], "en_short": ["A woman poses with her hands on her hips, sways to the rhythm, and performs a quick turn while the camera remains stationary.", "An indoor setting featuring cluttered shelves and patterned curtains under bright, realistic lighting."]}

{"cn_long": ["视频中一名年轻女子站在一个带有拱形门廊的室内空间。起初她双手叉腰站立，随后她举起一只手轻轻拂过发丝，头部也随之微微转动，眼神望向斜上方。摄像机始终保持固定机位，平稳地捕捉她这些自然且细微的行为动作。", "画面呈现出极简且优雅的室内风格，白色的拱形墙壁与深色的红砖地面构成了明亮的视觉对比。背景中阳光从窗户斜射进来，营造出柔和的自然光影氛围。场景左侧摆放着一张质朴的木质长椅。女子肩部背着一个精致的编织草包，整体画面呈现出写实且清新脱俗的美学质感。"], "cn_short": ["女子站在拱门前，举手拂过头发并轻微转头看向侧方，摄像机位固定。", "地中海风格的白墙红砖室内空间，伴有自然采光和木质长椅，女子背着一个小草包。"], "en_long": ["A young woman stands in an indoor space featuring elegant archways. Initially, she poses with her hands on her hips, then raises one hand to gently brush through her hair while slightly tilting her head and looking towards the upper side. The camera remains in a fixed position throughout, capturing these subtle and natural movements.", "The setting is a minimalist and elegant interior characterized by white arched walls and dark red brick flooring. Natural light streams in through the background windows, creating a soft and bright lighting atmosphere. A rustic wooden bench is positioned on the left side of the frame. The woman carries a woven straw bag on her shoulder, and the overall visual style is realistic with a fresh and serene aesthetic."], "en_short": ["The woman stands before an archway, raises her hand to her hair, and looks aside. The camera shot is fixed.", "Mediterranean-style interior with white walls, brick floors, natural lighting, and a wooden bench; the woman carries a small straw bag."]}
